name: agent-router
description: Route independent coding tasks from Codex to local ACP or CLI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Route isolated coding tasks to local coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Router helps Codex discover local coding agents, choose a safe worktree, record tracked jobs, inspect local worktree state, and continue or archive external agent sessions through a bundled MCP server. The current alpha can run OpenCode through ACP and Claude Code, Cursor Agent, or Codex through CLI fallback when external launch is explicitly enabled.
defaultPrompt: Run this task in a sibling worktree.
Show Agent Router jobs and sessions.
